hero.subtitle: Your shortcut to the right bottle in Hong Kong.
hero.desc1: Not sure what to drink? We'll help you decide.
hero.desc2: Want the best price? We'll compare for you.
hero.desc3: Looking for something new? We'll find it.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, region or style...

everyday.title: Everyday Sip
everyday.desc: A little joy after work, without the markup.

explore.title: Explore Something New
explore.desc: The world is wide. Start with one bottle.

ai.sectionDesc: Tell us your occasion, budget or taste preference. Our AI Wine Advisor finds the best three bottles from real wines on our platform.
ai.rec1Reason: Champagne never goes wrong — the pop is the best part.
ai.rec2Reason: The pink bottle is gorgeous, and the taste is light and fresh.
ai.rec3Reason: If she prefers lighter flavours, this one's a safe bet.

merchantCta.text: Are you a merchant? Join Your Wine Book and reach more wine lovers in Hong Kong.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Your Wine Book. All rights reserved.

search.pageDesc: Search, compare prices, and find your perfect bottle.
search.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or search terms

wine.expandTasting: Learn more: region story, tasting notes

aiPage.pageDesc: Tell me what you need, and I'll find the right wine for you.
aiPage.introDesc: You can share your occasion, budget, taste preferences, or anything on your mind.
aiPage.comingSoon: This is a demo conversation. AI Wine Advisor coming soon.

about.whoDesc: Your Wine Book is a wine discovery platform designed for consumers in Hong Kong. We believe great wine shouldn't be exclusive to experts. Through price comparison, scene-based recommendations, and our AI Wine Advisor, we make it easy for everyone to find the right bottle.
about.what1Desc: The same wine can vary hugely in price across merchants. We help you see it all at a glance.
about.what2Desc: Gifting? Dinner? Everyday? Tell us the occasion, and we'll recommend the best fit.
about.what3Desc: Wine stories told in plain language — no jargon, no pretension.
about.principle1Desc: We don't favour any merchant. We show the most honest prices and information.
about.principle2Desc: All price sources are clearly marked. You know where every dollar goes.
about.principle3Desc: We talk about wine in words you understand. No gatekeeping.
about.contactDesc: Questions or partnership inquiries? Reach out:

join.pageDesc: Join Your Wine Book and let more Hong Kong consumers discover your wines.
join.benefit1Desc: Our users are actively searching for great wines. Targeted traffic, no waste.
join.benefit2Desc: Get your own branded page to showcase your wines and specialties.
join.benefit3Desc: Receive instant order notifications via WhatsApp or Email.
